input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter tests by the "Integration" category using `dotnet test`. Let me look at their test file to understand what test framework they're using and how categories are defined.

data.content:
This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory]`. Run only the Integration tests with:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will match `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase` and `CreateOrder_SendsNotification` (and any other tests marked `[TestCategory("Integration")]`).
